name: Liz Varner
summary: Senior creative-development and strategy executive operating at the intersection of film, television, audio/IP development, packaging, and strategic company building. Strongest positioning is as a development/strategy hybrid: strong scripted instincts, commercial judgment, cross-functional execution ability, and the capacity to help a company both shape its slate and formalize how development works.

current_role.title: Principal
current_role.description: Series development and production consulting through a first-look deal with Sony Pictures Television Studios

previous_roles.title: SVP, Head of Creative, Original Content
previous_roles.highlight: Launched 15+ original series within four years

best_fit_environments: Companies in build or transition phase
Founder-led media businesses needing development judgment
target_roles: Head of TV/Film Development at nontraditional media company
Creative strategy roles with real content authority
